name: Initialize Scrum Project
prompt: I'm starting a new project called 'auth-service' on GitHub. Set it up for Scrum: create all the labels (type, priority, size, status namespaces), create Sprint 1 milestone ending in 2 weeks, and create the first sprint planning issue. The repo is mycompany/auth-service.

assertions.text: Creates type:* labels (type:feature, type:bug, type:chore, etc.) using gh label create
Creates size:* labels (size:xs, size:s, size:m, size:l, size:xl)
Creates Sprint 1 milestone with a due date using gh api or gh milestone
All gh commands shown are syntactically valid (no made-up flags)
Covers all 4 namespaces: type, priority, size, status
